title: verbascum henriquesii var. compositum
intro: Verbascum henriquesii var. compositum, also known as mullein, is a variety of the Verbascum henriquesii plant, a flowering perennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Verbascum henriquesii var. compositum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical applications, often used to treat skin conditions and respiratory problems.
